creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
The standard gitlab configuration is designed in a way zo works with all options for a standard FreeBSD installation.
I think you can modify the path of the git user, but then you need also to modify the gitlab configuration. It should work, but I have never tested this.

I will close the issue here now as this is not a problem with the package in itself. If you want to change the path a the git user, you can do this, but you also need to update the gitlab configuration (and not only gitlab, but also the other packages gitlab depend on)
